---
applyTo: "data/courses.data.md"
---

# courses.data.md instructions

This file lists personal training: courses and self-directed training followed outside school and university.

## Schema

One `##` section per course. Each section must contain, in this order:

- `Duration` — indicative duration, e.g. `40 hours`, `Jun 2021 – Present`, `3 months (2022)`.
- `Topics` — comma-separated list of topics covered.
- `Platform` — platform, school, or provider name (include a public URL when available).

## Rules

- One entry per course. Grouping into learning paths is allowed only when the provider markets it as a single program.
- Use web fetch to confirm topics and platform URLs when possible.
- Do not fabricate certifications or completion dates.
- Write everything in English.
- Use the `contribute-data` skill to append or update entries.
